nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 新喀里多尼亞
nodes.summary: 新喀里多尼亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联33种鸟类，包括Shining bronze cuckoo、扇尾杜鹃、Channel-billed cuckoo等33种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Southern shrikebill
nodes.summary: The southern shrikebill (Clytorhynchus pachycephaloides), or brown flycatcher, is a songbird species in the family Monarchidae. It is found in New Caledonia and Vanuatu. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. Subspecies Two subspecies are recognized: C. p. pachycephaloides - Elliot, 1870: Found on New Caledonia C. p. grisescens - Sharpe, 1899: Originally described as a separate species. Found on Banks Islands (Vanuatu) References
